generate.title: Generate
generate.password_hint_desc: If enabled, this password provides an additional layer of security. It must be confirmed and will be required during reconstruction.
generate.warning_k_equals_n: Warning: K equals N. If you lose even ONE share, your secret is lost forever! This provides no redundancy.
generate.warning_k_equals_1: Warning: K is 1. Anyone who finds ANY single share can read your secret! This offers zero structural security.
generate.stealth_desc: Pads all shares to maximum size. Hides secret length from observers.

reconstruct.paste_placeholder: Paste Base64 encoded shares here, one per line...

inspect.no_data: No share data provided to inspect.
inspect.encrypted_partial: Payload is encrypted. Share index and threshold are hidden because a password was not provided.

config.schema_v1_desc: Strictly adheres to FIPS-140 government compliance standards. Uses PBKDF2 (HMAC-SHA-250) with 600,000 iterations to secure passwords.
config.schema_v2_desc: Tuned for older hardware. Performs 100,000 iterations to accelerate share generation, trading cryptographic resistance for improved performance.
config.schema_v3_desc: Designed for powerful local machines. Increases PBKDF2 iterations to 2,000,000 using SHA-512 and 32 bytes of salt, resulting in significantly higher computational cost.
config.schema_v4_desc: Memory-hard configuration. Utilizes Argon2id requiring 64MB of RAM per derivation, designed to increase the resource cost for specialized cracking hardware.
config.schema_v5_desc: Lower memory footprint Argon2id profile (19 MiB). Balances adherence to OWASP recommendations with the hardware constraints of mobile browsers.
config.schema_v6_desc: Legacy specialized memory-hard protection utilizing scrypt at the OWASP recommended baseline (N=131072). Mandates significant RAM scaling.

help.title: Help & Overview
help.what_is_body:
PieceKeeper allows you to securely distribute a secret among multiple trusted parties or physical locations using QR codes, NFC tags, and text. Built on Shamir's Secret Sharing (SSS) cryptography, it takes your sensitive data—like master passwords or seed phrases—and mathematically splits it into distinct shares.

Instead of relying on a single point of failure, you define a threshold (e.g., "I need any 3 out of 5 shares"). You can also apply an optional two-factor password, ensuring that even if your physical shares are discovered, the secret cannot be decoded.
help.end_user_body:
• Stateless & Air-Gapped: PieceKeeper makes zero network requests. Your data never leaves your device, regardless of who hosts or serves the application.
  • Shares Are Sovereign: Only your distinct cryptographic shares matter. As long as you possess the minimum threshold, your secret can be reconstructed from any instance of the application.
  • Two-Factor Encryption: Optionally lock your shares with a master password. When enabled, possessing the physical shares alone is not sufficient—the decryption password is also required during reconstruction.
help.how_to_body:
1. Generate: Enter your secret, choose total shares and the minimum threshold required. Optionally lock them with a password.
  2. Distribute: Save shares as text, print them as QR codes, or write them to NFC cards. Distribute to trusted people or locations.
  3. Reconstruct: Gather the required threshold of shares. Paste them, scan QR codes, or tap NFC cards to reveal the secret.
help.scenarios_body:
• Estate Planning & Inheritance: Split a cryptocurrency wallet seed phrase among family members and a lawyer. Funds can only be accessed when the required threshold of parties come together, preventing any single individual from accessing them alone.
  • Geographic Distribution: Split a master backup password and store shares in different physical locations—a home safe, a bank deposit box, and a secure office. Even if one location is compromised, the secret remains protected.
  • Distributed Team Access: Split a critical server password or API key among 5 executives, requiring at least 3 to agree before it can be unlocked. No single person holds unilateral access.

pwa.lockout_desc: PieceKeeper is a hardware-grade web vault. To ensure maximum device security and safe offline routing for hardware NFC readers, you must install this application to your device's Home Screen.
pwa.lockout_sub: Please use your browser menu to 'Add to Home Screen' or 'Install App', then launch it from your device desktop.

camera_pre_flight.title: Camera Access Required
camera_pre_flight.description: To scan QR codes securely, PieceKeeper needs temporary access to your camera. Your video feed is processed entirely offline within your browser and is never transmitted anywhere.

nfc.modal_desc: Hold device near physical NFC tag...
nfc.modal_desc_write: Hold device near blank NFC tag...
nfc.nfc_preflight_desc: PieceKeeper needs permission to access your device's NFC antenna to read and write cryptographic shares. Please click 'Allow' on the next prompt.
nfc.antenna_active: Antenna active. Approach an NFC Card.

progress.qr_read_next: Share accepted. Please scan QR Code {c} ({t} total required).
progress.qr_read_next_unknown: Share accepted. Please scan next QR Code...

password_prompt.title: Password Required
password_prompt.desc: This share is encrypted. Enter the password used during share creation to unlock it.

email.subject: PieceKeeper Share - Index {index}
email.instructions: To reconstruct, paste this share into PieceKeeper's Reconstruct tab, or use the app's QR scanner to scan the QR code from the Generate screen.
